principle: Do not equate valid JSON, recognized containers, source-lane presence, or UI availability with trusted biblical text.

notes: Currently named canonical NT defects are repaired or overlay-represented without main-row insertion.
This does not assert a fresh full scholarly collation of every NT verse.

reasons: Ordinary canonical OT non-Psalms chapter/verse completeness audit passed for 38 books and 779 chapters with zero findings.
Daniel 11 NABRE source text is absent from the preserved controlled source lane and is governed as an exclusion, not repaired by synthesis.
Nehemiah 7:73 is governed as an adapter/versification display policy, not a synthetic text repair.
This lane-level trust result excludes Psalms, which remain a separate not-trusted legacy psalter subsystem.

latest_canonical_ot_final_trust_audit.summary: Canonical OT non-Psalms final trust readiness passed after ordinary OT completeness, recovery consolidation, trust boundary, Daniel 11 governed source-absent exclusion, and Nehemiah 7:73 adapter policy checks. This is not a whole-Bible or whole-OT-with-Psalms trust claim.

latest_nehemiah_7_73_adapter_policy.summary: Nehemiah 7:73 is not a missing-row defect. NRSV/Rotherham/KJV active row 7:73 contains both the settlement close and the seventh-month transition. NABRE places the settlement close at 7:72 and the seventh-month transition at 8:1. Preserve source text by source address; any harmonized display requires adapter/view policy rather than synthetic row construction.

latest_daniel_11_source_absent_policy.summary: The preserved controlled NABRE source lane at commit d0eed049 contains Daniel chapter 11 with an empty verses array. Daniel 11:1-45 remains without NABRE active text by governed exclusion. Do not synthesize NABRE, scrape substitute text, or overlay from another translation. Canonical OT may proceed only to final trust audit with this exclusion recorded.

latest_psalms_trust_readiness_classifica.summary: Psalms are shape-governed and internally counted, but not trust-ready. Record count and translation-count checks passed, but provenance and lane identity must be adjudicated before any Psalms textual trust claim.

psalms.reason: Psalms provenance and lane-adjudication inspection is recorded. The legacy Psalms bundle is shape-governed, but existing records contain only id and text keys and lack row-level source/provenance metadata. No Psalms textual trust claim is allowed without external provenance acquisition or a governed Psalms rebuild. No Bible text mutation was performed.

broader_canon.reason: Broader canon source-adjudication is policy-closed for the current active corpus, but the lane remains not textually trusted. The raw corpus is governed, with 38 candidate records, 36 raw-text-only records, and 2 zero-row records. No Bible text mutation was performed.

reasons: Only bounded Vulgate pilot lanes exist; the full Vulgate corpus is not built.
No Vulgate buildout, integration, source acquisition, or expansion is authorized until the active non-Vulgate corpus is trusted.
Existing Vulgate pilot work may be audited later, after active non-Vulgate corpus trust is established.

latest_vulgate_deferral_policy.summary: The Vulgate pilot remains protected and not trusted. Do not build, expand, source-acquire, or integrate Vulgate until the active non-Vulgate corpus is trusted. After that, audit the existing Vulgate pilot state before any future Vulgate build decision.

latest_greek_esther_form_policy.summary: Active Greek Esther is governed as NRSV named-Addition form plus ordinary Esther chapters. DRB/NABRE row-grid deltas are not repair instructions. Do not rewrite to DRB numbered extension chapters, NABRE row grid, or ordinary Esther-only form without a separate canonical-form migration policy.

latest_deuterocanon_source_shape_review.summary: Greek Esther and Greek Daniel source-shape review found no safe simple overlay. Greek Esther has substantial active/DRB/ordinary Esther form divergence. Greek Daniel is closer to DRB but remaining mismatches fall in Greek-addition territory. No Bible text was changed.

latest_maccabees_3_4_source_state.summary: Current active 3 and 4 Maccabees files already carry NRSV source-backed repair metadata from BibleGateway NRSVA and the historical repair commit 8177b52. Raw source acquisition is no longer the next blocker for these files; further work is bounded source/form review and known-gap policy.

latest_maccabees_4_variant_footnote_poli.summary: BibleGateway NRSVA presents 4 Maccabees 10:4 and 11:7-8 as other-authority footnote additions, not primary body-text rows. They remain governed variant material and must not be inserted into active rows without a separate variant apparatus policy.

latest_greek_daniel_form_policy.summary: Active Greek Daniel is governed as one NRSV extended Daniel book: Daniel 1-12, Prayer of Azariah/Song embedded in chapter 3, Susanna as chapter 13, and Bel and the Dragon as chapter 14. DRB/NABRE row-grid deltas are not repair instructions.

Vulgate remains deferred and audit-only.
